posts.text:
The transcript is a rich input, not final truth. Maya Chen explains why raw transcripts as publish-ready copy lead to broken quotes—and how separating raw from cleaned versions keeps quality high.

→ https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen

Organized system or archaeological dig? Maya Chen's five-step pipeline fix needs no elaborate tooling. Just consistency.

What's the first thing you'd fix in your production workflow?

→ https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release
